message: 🌱 Add external-secrets: [AWS] Support the new EKS Pod Identity Agent mission (#659)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "external-secrets-2951-aws-support-the-new-eks-pod-identity-agent",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "external-secrets: [AWS] Support the new EKS Pod Identity Agent",
+    "description": "[AWS] Support the new EKS Pod Identity Agent. This issue affects 34+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify external-secrets troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your external-secrets deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets -n external-secrets --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review external-secrets configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant external-secrets configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets\nkubectl get configmap -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=external-secrets\n```\n## Description of the bug\n\nExternal Secrets v0.9.9 installed in EKS does not work with the new [EKS Pod Identity Agent](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/eks/latest/userguide/pod-identities.html) feature (alternative to IRSA)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [AWS] Support the new EKS Pod Identity Agent",
+        "description": "> Are you saying that this won't work because the pod has already assumed the role using the identity association, and can't then assume another role?\n\nYou can use `serviceAccountRef` only with IRSA, not Pod Identity. That's because the Pod Identity agent verifies the identity of the caller (ESO)\n```yaml\n2023/12/13 09:44:17 Ignoring, HTTP credential provider invalid endpoint host, \"169.254.170.23\", only loopback hosts are allowed. <nil>\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [AWS] Support the new EKS Pod Identity Agent is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets -n external-secrets --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n external-secrets --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "> Are you saying that this won't work because the pod has already assumed the role using the identity association, and can't then assume another role?\n\nYou can use `serviceAccountRef` only with IRSA, not Pod Identity. That's because the Pod Identity agent verifies the identity of the caller (ESO) and hence it can not impersonate a different service account.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "2023/12/13 09:44:17 Ignoring, HTTP credential provider invalid endpoint host, \"169.254.170.23\", only loopback hosts are allowed. <nil>",
+        "{\n    \"Statement\": [\n        {\n            \"Action\": [\n                \"secretsmanager:GetResourcePolicy\",\n                \"secretsmanager:GetSecretValue\",\n                \"secretsmanager:DescribeSecret\",\n                \"secretsmanager:ListSecretVersionIds\"\n            ],\n            \"Effect\": \"Allow\",\n            \"Resource\": [\n                \"*\"\n            ]\n        }\n    ],\n    \"Version\": \"2012-10-17\"\n}",
+        "{\n    \"Version\": \"2012-10-17\",\n    \"Statement\": [\n        {\n            \"Sid\": \"AllowEksAuthToAssumeRoleForPodIdentity\",\n            \"Effect\": \"Allow\",\n            \"Principal\": {\n                \"Service\": \"pods.eks.amazonaws.com\"\n            },\n            \"Action\": [\n                \"sts:AssumeRole\",\n                \"sts:TagSession\"\n            ]\n        }\n    ]\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "external-secrets",
+      "sandbox",
+      "security",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "external-secrets"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Namespace",
+      "Serviceaccount"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets/issues/2951",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets"
+    },
+    "reactions": 34,
+    "comments": 35,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with external-secrets installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T06:32:07.903Z",

+}
